name: 退款政策页面布局
description: RummyRoyal 主题退款政策页面布局

config.content.title: Refund Policy
config.content.body: This Refund Policy outlines the conditions under which RummyRoyal processes refunds for deposits and other transactions.
config.toc.items:
Eligibility for Refund|Refunds are available for failed transactions, double charges, or technical errors that prevented gameplay. Refunds are not available for losses in games.
Refund Process|To request a refund, contact our support team with your transaction ID and details. We process refund requests within 5-7 business days.
Refund Methods|Refunds are processed to the original payment method used for the transaction. Processing time depends on your bank or payment provider.
Non-Refundable Items|Entry fees for completed games, tournament registrations where play has commenced, and promotional bonus amounts are non-refundable.
Disputed Transactions|If you believe a transaction was unauthorized, contact us immediately. We investigate all disputes thoroughly and fairly.
Contact for Refunds|Email support@rummyroyal.com with subject line 'Refund Request' and include your registered email, transaction ID, and reason for refund.
